CE1.justification: Acted directly on the workspace contents (grep + line count) without asking the user to recall or restate anything before responding.

CE2.justification: Substantive content is warranted, but the response includes an enumerated list of eight inbound references plus a three-option alternatives menu and a closing meta-comment, several stretches longer than needed for the pushback.

CE3.justification: Clearly stated no workspace files were mutated and named exactly which paths were read/grepped, with the reasoning (anchor breakage, sycophancy preamble) inline.

CE4.justification: No mutations performed in the workspace; an interrupt at any point would leave zero orphan artifacts.
